mechanism: Additive pharmacodynamic effect increasing antiplatelet and anticoagulant action
clinical_recommendation: Avoid concurrent use if possible; if necessary monitor PT/INR and signs of bleeding closely

mechanism: Synergistic nitric oxide/cGMP-mediated vasodilation leading to severe life-threatening hypotension
clinical_recommendation: Contraindicated; avoid co-administration within 24-48 hours of PDE5 inhibitor use

mechanism: Combined serotonergic accumulation and CYP2D6 metabolic inhibition increasing serotonin syndrome and seizure risks
clinical_recommendation: Avoid combination; select a non-serotonergic analgesic or non-inhibitory antidepressant

mechanism: Additive potassium-sparing and exogenous supplementation effects inducing severe hyperkalemia
clinical_recommendation: Avoid concurrent use unless actively indicated; monitor serum potassium and ECG regularly

mechanism: Amiodarone inhibits CYP3A4 metabolism increasing simvastatin exposure and risk of rhabdomyolysis
clinical_recommendation: Do not exceed simvastatin 20mg daily; consider switching to a non-CYP3A4 metabolized statin

mechanism: Clarithromycin inhibits CYP3A4 reducing amlodipine metabolism and causing severe hypotension
clinical_recommendation: Monitor blood pressure closely; consider an alternative antibiotic or reduce amlodipine dose

mechanism: NSAID-induced prostaglandin inhibition impairs renal afferent vasodilation counteracting ACE inhibitor effects
clinical_recommendation: Monitor blood pressure and renal function; avoid prolonged concurrent use especially in elderly

mechanism: Contrast-induced acute kidney injury leads to metformin accumulation and lactic acidosis
clinical_recommendation: Withhold metformin prior to or at the time of procedure and resume 48 hours later after verifying normal renal function

mechanism: Additive central nervous system and respiratory depression via concurrent GABA and mu-opioid receptor activation
clinical_recommendation: Avoid co-prescribing; if unavoidable prescribe lowest effective doses and monitor for respiratory depression

mechanism: Potent CYP1A2 inhibition by ciprofloxacin leads to dramatically elevated tizanidine levels and profound hypotension
clinical_recommendation: Contraindicated; avoid concurrent use and select alternative therapeutic agents

mechanism: Penicillins compete for renal tubular secretion increasing methotrexate levels and bone marrow toxicity
clinical_recommendation: Monitor complete blood count and methotrexate levels closely; consider alternative antibiotics

mechanism: Additive prolongation of the QT interval increasing the risk of Torsades de Pointes
clinical_recommendation: Monitor ECG for QTc prolongation; correct underlying electrolyte imbalances before initiation

mechanism: Competitive CYP2C19 inhibition by omeprazole reduces the metabolic activation of clopidogrel
clinical_recommendation: Avoid omeprazole; utilize an alternative proton pump inhibitor with lower CYP2C19 inhibition like pantoprazole

mechanism: Serotonin reuptake inhibition impairs platelet aggregation compounding NSAID-induced mucosal bleeding risk
clinical_recommendation: Monitor for signs of gastrointestinal bleeding; consider gastroprotective therapy if used long-term

mechanism: Moderate CYP3A4 inhibition by fluconazole mildly increases atorvastatin plasma concentration
clinical_recommendation: Monitor for unexplained muscle pain or weakness; temporarily hold or decrease statin dose if high-dose azole is required
